name: Kimpton AI
oneliner: AI-native investment research — autonomous research across 120K+ assets with agentic charting, backtesting, prediction markets, and structured trade proposals.
team: Ex-Goldman Sachs quant fund operators. Ran $10M fund before age 23. YC P26.
finserv: Built by ex-quant fund operators. 120K+ assets, real-time data.
thesis: Kimpton AI is the most product-complete Research & Signal Intelligence specialist in this batch — autonomous research across 120K+ assets with backtesting and structured trade proposals. The Goldman quant pedigree and YC P26 backing de-risk execution. As a front-line research agent, it would consume verified financial data and regulatory context from an infrastructure layer to produce auditable investment recommendations.
